props.content: Everything you need to ship faster
Powerful features designed to streamline your workflow from idea to production.

props.title: Lightning Fast
props.description: Sub-second build times with incremental compilation and smart caching across your entire project.

props.title: Team Collaboration
props.description: Real-time multiplayer editing with conflict resolution, comments, and change tracking built in.

props.title: Enterprise Security
props.description: SOC 2 compliant with end-to-end encryption, role-based access control, and audit logging.

props.title: Smart Analytics
props.description: Actionable insights with custom dashboards, funnel analysis, and automated anomaly detection.

props.title: Global CDN
props.description: Deploy to 200+ edge locations worldwide. Your users get blazing speed no matter where they are.

props.title: API First
props.description: Comprehensive REST and GraphQL APIs with SDKs for JavaScript, Python, Go, and Ruby.
